## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets were added to code or docs
- [ ] Authorization is enforced server-side (not client-side)
- [ ] Tenant isolation was preserved
- [ ] Sensitive storage remains private
- [ ] New DB/RPC changes include least-privilege rules

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Relevant migrations tested (if any)

## Notes

Any caveats, rollout details, or follow-up tasks.
